inputs.label: Raw Material Footprint
inputs.businessContext: Carbon footprint from raw material extraction and processing

inputs.label: Manufacturing Footprint
inputs.businessContext: Emissions from manufacturing process energy and waste

inputs.label: Transport Distance
inputs.businessContext: Total distance transported over product lifecycle

inputs.label: Transport Emission Factor
inputs.businessContext: Emission factor per kilometer for transport mode

inputs.label: Use Phase Energy
inputs.businessContext: Energy consumed during product use phase

inputs.label: Use Phase Emission Factor
inputs.businessContext: Grid emission factor for use phase electricity

inputs.label: End-of-Life Footprint
inputs.businessContext: Emissions from disposal, recycling, or incineration
